goal: polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness(p, a, q) = forall(x0: R) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at(p, a, q, x0) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Polynomial[T0]) { forall(x3: T0) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at[T0](x0, x1, x2, x3) } = polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, a, q)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[R](x)

not polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at(p, a, q, lib(functions).identity_fn(x))
function(x0: R) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at(p, a, q, x0) }(lib(functions).identity_fn(x))

goal: polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at(p, a, q, x) = (polynomial_eval(p, x) = polynomial_eval(q, x) * (x - a))

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Polynomial[T0], x3: T0) { polynomial_eval[T0](x0, x1) = polynomial_eval[T0](x2, x1) * (x1 - x3) = polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at[T0](x0, x3, x2, x1) }[R](p, x, q, a)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) + (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n)
R.0 + (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n) = (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R]((x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n))

goal: (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n) * (x - a)

p.c: function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[R](polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n), x - a)

let w0: R satisfy { not polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at(p, a, q, w0) }
function(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(q, x0) * (x0 - a) = polynomial_eval(p, x0) }(w0)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Polynomial[T0], x3: T0) { polynomial_eval[T0](x0, x1) = polynomial_eval[T0](x2, x1) * (x1 - x3) = polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at[T0](x0, x3, x2, x1) }[R](p, w0, q, a)
not polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at(p, a, q, w0) or polynomial_eval(q, w0) * (w0 - a) = polynomial_eval(p, w0)
polynomial_eval(q, w0) * (w0 - a) != polynomial_eval(p, w0) or polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at(p, a, q, w0)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) + (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, m)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Polynomial[T0], x3: T0) { polynomial_eval[T0](x0, x1) = polynomial_eval[T0](x2, x1) * (x1 - x3) = polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_at[T0](x0, x3, x2, x1) }[R](p, w0, q, a)

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0) { exists(k0: Polynomial[T0]) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness[T0](x0, x1, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial[T0](x0, x1) }[R](p, a)
not exists(k0: Polynomial[R]) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness(p, a, k0) } or polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial(p, a)
(forall(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness(p, a, x0) or polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial(p, a) })
(forall(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness(p, a, x0) })
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) } }[Polynomial[R]](polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness(p, a), polynomial_quotient(p, a, n))

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0) { exists(k0: Polynomial[T0]) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness[T0](x0, x1, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial[T0](x0, x1) }[R](p, a)
